summary: The specific design and targeted delivery method used in paravertebral blocks minimize accidental spread above; thus, the subarachnoid space remains far less probable as a site for inadvertent infiltration due to its anatomical distance relative to typical needle trajectories during procedure setup. \(\blacksquare\)
